summary: Critical flaws prevent this test suite from functioning. The workflow.test.ts references fixture files (fixtures/junit-run1.xml, fixtures/junit-run2.xml, fixtures/results-run3.json) that are never created or provided, so tests will immediately fail. The suite tests individual modules (parser, aggregator, markdown) in isolation but lacks integration tests through the actual CLI/main functions. No error handling tests exist for invalid XML, malformed JSON, missing files, or edge cases like empty test arrays or division-by-zero in percentage calculations. The task explicitly requires all tests to run through GitHub Actions via `act`, but the test code shows no mechanism for this—it only checks that the workflow file exists and references scripts correctly, rather than executing and verifying the workflow. These critical gaps mean the test suite would fail on first run and provides weak regression protection.
